message:
fix: bedrock provider defensive guards and fallback order

- Add bedrock to getApiKey/validateApiKey early-return guards (returns
  empty string like ollama, since bedrock uses AWS credential chain)
- Add bedrock to FALLBACK_ORDER so it participates in provider fallback
- Add bedrock to primaryUsesImplicitAuth check so explicitly-configured
  bedrock works even with IAM role auth (no env vars to detect)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
